---
name: measurement-learning-loop
description: Use after campaigns run to interpret results and update memory without confusing attribution with incrementality.
---
# Measurement Learning Loop

## Process

1. State campaign job.
2. State primary metric.
3. Check data quality.
4. Interpret results with alternatives.
5. Decide scale, refresh, continue, pause, or stop.
6. Update memory.

## Output

```markdown
# Learning Memo

## Hypothesis
## Result
## Interpretation
## Alternative explanations
## Decision
## Confidence
## Memory updates
```
